prompt: How do I use a scale in Strudel so all my notes sound good together? I want to play in C minor.

assertions.description: Response demonstrates n() combined with .scale("C:minor") or similar
assertions.check: Response demonstrates n() combined with .scale("C:minor") or similar

assertions.description: Response explains that n() numbers are scale degrees where 0 is the root
assertions.check: Response explains that n() numbers are scale degrees where 0 is the root

assertions.description: Response indicates that any integer can be used and it will stay in scale
assertions.check: Response indicates that any integer can be used and it will stay in scale
